answer:
Sudipta Mandal has 5 years and 9 months of total software engineering experience as of June 2026.

This total is calculated by merging overlapping or contiguous roles, including his work at Cargo Stream, Sports Fixtures, Eucaps AB, and North South University Problem Solvers. This information is based on the authoritative backend-computed duration and the "Work Experience Timeline" (Source 1, 2, and 4).
